app.name: Kizuna
app.offline: You are offline. Your itinerary, room, and transport details are cached and still readable.
app.noEvent: No active event right now. Check back soon.

events.title: All events
events.subtitle: Switch which event the app is showing. The active event applies by default.
events.cleared: Switched back to the active event.

auth.signInSubtitle: Use single sign-on if you are a Supabase teammate. Use your invitation email and password if you are a guest.
auth.needAccount: Need to create a guest account?

errors.invalidCredentials: That email and password do not match.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailRequired: Enter your email first so we know where to send the recovery link.
errors.recoveryFailed: Could not send the recovery email. Try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Could not complete sign-in. Try again.

home.factsSubtitle: All hail the legend of Team 18.

jetLag.title: Jet lag fighter
jetLag.subtitle: {{offset}} hours {{direction}} from where you live now. Expect {{severity}} jet lag.
jetLag.disclaimer: General guidance, not medical advice. Confirm with your doctor for any chronic-use plans.

icebreaker.title: Get to know your teammate
icebreaker.subtitle: A real fun fact from a fellow attendee. Take a guess, then reveal.

tiles.registration: Finish your event registration step by step.
tiles.itinerary: Your flights, transfers, room, and sessions.
tiles.documents: Waiver, code of conduct, and travel guidance.
tiles.consent: Review and re-confirm any pending documents.
tiles.admin: Live reports, conflict resolution, and operations.

boundary.title: Something Went Wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Reload the page to try again.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

cards.personalInfo: Name, badge name, and the city you call home.
cards.emergencyContact: Who we should reach out to if something happens.
cards.dietary: Restrictions and notes for the kitchen.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Find people, share stories, and meet your fellow attendees.
community.noProfileYet: Set up your community profile so others can find you.

profile.title: Community profile
profile.description: Visible to other attendees so people can connect with you.
profile.funFactPlaceholder: Something a stranger would never guess.
profile.hobbiesPlaceholder: Type to add a hobby and press Enter.

matches.empty: No matches yet — add a few hobbies and a hometown to your community profile.
matches.name: Name

channels.title: Community channels
channels.broadcastConfirmBody: This will post the message to every active channel.

footer.rights: Powered by Supabase. Built with Kizuna.

registration.title: Registration
registration.errorSaving: We could not save your changes. Please try again.

personalInfo.preferredNameHint: How your name appears on your badge.
personalInfo.legalNameHint: Exactly as printed on your passport. We use this for travel documents and the dinner seating chart.

dietary.alcoholFree: Please do not serve me alcohol
dietary.severityHint: Anaphylactic risks are flagged to the kitchen.
dietary.notes: Anything else our kitchen should know

accessibility.intro: Tell us about any accommodations you need. We'll keep this with the events team only.
accessibility.notesHint: Anything we should know in advance — quiet rooms, dietary needs already covered above, room layout requests.

passport.intro: Your passport details are encrypted at rest and never visible to admins.
passport.issuingCountryHint: The country whose authority issued the passport.
passport.expiryWarning: This passport expires before the event ends. Please use a passport valid for at least six months past your travel.

guests.intro: Invite the people coming with you. Adults (18+) get their own login and email. Kids ride on your registration with no email needed. The total fee is charged to you.
guests.inviteBody: We'll email a single-use link valid for 7 days. Once they accept, they get their own Kizuna account and can complete the rest of registration themselves.
guests.bracketIntro: How old is the guest you're inviting? The fee is rolled into your Stripe checkout, not theirs.

bracketHints.under_12: Added to your registration. No email or login.
bracketHints.teen: Added to your registration. No email or login.
bracketHints.adult: Sent an email invite with their own login.

guests.detailsIntroAdult: Tell us their name and email. They'll receive a single-use invite link valid for 7 days.
guests.detailsIntroMinor: Tell us their name. You can edit dietary needs and other details from their profile later.
guests.empty: No guests yet. Add one to get started.
guests.totalHint: Charged to your card in one transaction. Profiles complete once Stripe clears.
guests.payHint: We open a Stripe Checkout in this window. Once payment clears, every adult invitation goes out and dependents are unblocked.
guests.confirmRemoveMinor: Remove {{name}} from your registration? Their fee comes off the total.
guests.editInvitationHint: You can edit name and email until the guest accepts. After acceptance, they update their own profile.

dependents.intro: Add kids or anyone else travelling with you who won't have their own login. Each dependent costs USD $500 for children and $950 for adults.
dependents.ageHint: Used to calculate the fee tier and meal allowance.

swag.intro: Tell us your t-shirt and shoe sizes so we can order the right gear ahead of time.
swag.shoeSizeHint: Pick the system you know — we store everything as EU.

transport.intro: Tell us which legs you'd like an airport transfer for. We use this to build the shuttle manifest.

options.none: I'm arranging my own transport for both legs.
options.arrival: I need a ride from the airport on arrival only.
options.departure: I need a ride to the airport on departure only.
options.both: I need rides for both arrival and departure.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Live operational data.
admin.comingSoon: Coming soon. This section is under construction.

groundTransport.title: Ground Transport Tool
groundTransport.subtitle: Flights grouped into 30-minute pickup windows, then by shared flight. Assign each passenger to a vehicle.
groundTransport.empty: No flights for this leg yet. They will appear as travel data syncs.
groundTransport.needsReviewHint: This passenger's flight changed after a vehicle was assigned. Pick a new vehicle.
groundTransport.noVehicles: No vehicles yet. Click New vehicle to add the first.
groundTransport.noVehiclesForLeg: No vehicles for this leg. Add one to start assigning.

roomAssignment.title: Room Assignment Tool
roomAssignment.subtitle: Import rooms from your hotel block, then assign attendees by leadership tier, family size, and registration order.
roomAssignment.empty: No rooms imported yet. Click Import room block to upload your hotel sheet.
roomAssignment.csvHint: Headers required: room_number (and at minimum description). Optional: size_sqm or size_sqft, is_suite, capacity.
roomAssignment.fileHint: Same headers as the paste path. The file's contents are loaded into the textarea so you can review before importing.
roomAssignment.comingSoon: This tool is being built. Hold tight.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Every event in Kizuna. Past and future.
events.deleteConfirm: Hard-delete this event and every event-scoped row (sessions, registrations, accommodations, transport, itinerary, documents)? Personal profile data survives. This cannot be undone.
events.empty: No events yet. Create the first one to get started.
events.formHint: Edit the basics here. Invitations live on the next tab.

flags.title: Visibility and status
flags.isActiveHint: Only one supafest event can be active at a time. Active events drive the welcome screen.
flags.inviteAllHint: When on, every active employee sees this event. Otherwise, invitations must be added one by one.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.subtitle: Sessions, speakers, and the daily schedule.
agenda.empty: No sessions yet. Import a CSV or add them via the admin agenda viewer.
agenda.deleteConfirm: Remove this session from the agenda?

fields.title: Title
fields.subtitle: Subtitle
fields.mandatory: Auto-add to every relevant attendee's itinerary

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Versioned documents shown in registration and the documents tab.

feed.title: Feed
feed.subtitle: Editorial items pinned to the home screen.
feed.deleteConfirm: Remove this feed item from the home screen?
feed.empty: Nothing here yet. Add an item.
feed.noItems: No feed items yet. Use Add feed item to publish the first one.

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Attendance, dietary mix, registration funnel, country breakdown.

funnel.title: Registration funnel
funnel.subtitle: How attendees are progressing through registration.

dietary.title: Dietary restrictions
dietary.subtitle: Vegan, vegetarian, halal, kosher, gluten-free, dairy-free.

allergies.title: Allergies
allergies.subtitle: Nuts, shellfish, dairy, eggs, soy, wheat, sesame, other.

alcoholFree.title: Alcohol-free
alcoholFree.subtitle: Share of attendees who prefer no alcohol.
alcoholFree.label: alcohol-free

tenure.title: Years attended
tenure.subtitle: Distribution of prior Supafest attendance, from first-timers on the left to veterans on the right.

accessibility.title: Accessibility needs
accessibility.subtitle: Mobility, vision, hearing, neurodivergent, chronic, other.

nudges.title: Nudges
nudges.subtitle: Manual nudges, deadline reminders, and the full audit log.
nudges.empty: No nudges have been sent yet.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Live reports for hotel, transport, kitchen, and finance.

share.created: Share link created. Expires in 7 days.
share.copyFailed: Could not copy. Select the link and copy it manually.

conflicts.title: Data conflicts
conflicts.subtitle: When external sources disagree with Kizuna, every discrepancy lands here for review.

admin.blocked: You do not have permission to view this page.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.subtitle: Browse the schedule. Star the sessions you want to attend.
agenda.empty: No sessions yet. Check back as the schedule lands.
agenda.noFavorites: You have not starred any sessions yet.

shareReport.notFound: This share link does not exist.
shareReport.expired: This share link has expired. Ask the event team for a new one.
shareReport.error: Could not load this report. Please try again later.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: Nothing yet. We will let you know when there is.

itinerary.title: Your Itinerary
itinerary.subtitle: Your schedule for the event.

empty.title: Nothing on your itinerary yet
empty.body: Click Add to Itinerary to paste a confirmation email or upload a booking PDF — we'll structure it for you.

edit.title: Edit itinerary element
edit.editableHint: Add a special request below — every other detail is system-managed.
edit.readOnlyHint: This item is read-only. Details are managed by your event admin.
edit.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Crib, accessibility, dietary, anything else our team should know.
edit.specialRequestsHint: Visible to event ops only. Save to update.

guestSync.label: Sync with my sponsor's itinerary
guestSync.description: When on, your itinerary mirrors the employee who invited you. Turn off to manage your own schedule.
guestSync.enabled: Now syncing with your sponsor's itinerary.
guestSync.disabled: Sync turned off. Your itinerary is your own again.

import.title: Add to Your Itinerary
import.subtitle: Paste a confirmation email, upload a PDF, or forward your booking. We'll structure it for you.
import.pastePlaceholder: Paste your flight, hotel, or transfer confirmation here…
import.pasteHint: Works best with the full text of the confirmation email.
import.nothingFound: We could not find anything to import. Try pasting more text.
import.error: We could not parse that just now. Try again or import manually.
import.uploadDropTitle: Drop a PDF or click to pick
import.uploadDropHint: Booking PDFs from airlines, hotels, and travel agents. We extract the text on your device — the file never leaves your browser.
import.uploadError: Could not read that file. Use Paste text or try another export.
import.emailComingSoonHint: Forward to itinerary@kizuna.dev once we have it wired.

checkin.title: Check-In
checkin.subtitle: Show this code at registration to confirm your arrival.
checkin.noToken: Your check-in code will appear here once your registration is approved.

itinerary.conflict: Overlaps with another item on your day

guests.invitationSubtitle: Set a password to accept your guest invitation. The link expires seven days from when {{sponsor}} sent it.

errors.missingToken: This invitation link is missing its token. Ask {{sponsor}} to resend.
errors.expired: This invitation has expired. Ask the sponsoring employee to send a new one.
errors.badSignature: This invitation link is not valid. Please use the original email link.
errors.generic: We could not accept your invitation. Try again or contact support.

checkout.title: Confirm Your Spot
checkout.subtitle: We charge a flat fee that covers your accommodation, meals, and activities for the duration of Supafest.

documents.createSubtitle: Drafts publish immediately to everyone in this event.
documents.requiresAcknowledgement: Requires every attendee to read and sign
documents.signSubtitle: Read the document below. Type your full legal name to sign once you reach the end.
documents.signSuccess: Thank you. Your acknowledgement is on file.
documents.signFailure: We could not record your signature. Try again.
documents.complianceSubtitle: Who has and has not signed each required document.
documents.scrollToContinue: Scroll to the end to continue
documents.explicitCheckboxLabel: I have read and agree to the {{title}}
documents.versionBumped: This document has been updated. Please re-read and confirm.
documents.errorSaving: We could not record your acknowledgement. Please try again.

pdf.label: PDF file
pdf.unavailable: This PDF is not available right now.

notion.label: Notion URL
notion.hint: Paste a public Notion link. We will display a button that opens it; ingestion ships in a later phase.

uploader.dropOrClick: Drop a file here or click to choose
uploader.tooLarge: File is too large. Limit is {{mb}} MB.
uploader.unsupportedType: That file type is not supported.
uploader.tooManyFiles_one: You can upload at most {{max}} files; remove {{extra}} file.
uploader.tooManyFiles_other: You can upload at most {{max}} files; remove {{extra}} files.

adminDocuments.title: Documents
adminDocuments.subtitle: Versioned documents shown in registration and the documents tab.
adminDocuments.deleteConfirm: Delete this document? Acknowledgements will remain in the audit log.
adminDocuments.empty: No documents yet. Use Add document to publish the first one.
